alignment.id: Unique identifier for each alignment category, ranging from 1 to 4.
alignment.alignment: Descriptive quality of alignment, indicating performance from Bad to Neutral.

attribute.id: Unique identifier for each attribute, ranging from 1 to 6.
attribute.attribute_name: Descriptive name of the attribute, indicating its specific characteristic.

colour.id: Unique identifier for each colour entry, ensuring distinct records.
colour.colour: Descriptive name of the colour, representing various shades and combinations.

gender.id: Unique numeric identifier for each gender category.
gender.gender: Descriptive label representing the gender identity of individuals.

publisher.id: Unique identifier for each publisher, ensuring distinct records in the database.
publisher.publisher_name: Name of the publisher, representing the brand behind the published content.

race.id: Unique identifier for each race entry in the database.
race.race: Descriptive name of the fictional race or species represented.

superhero.id: Unique identifier for each superhero in the database.
superhero.superhero_name: The alias or title used by the superhero in their adventures.
superhero.full_name: The real name of the superhero, often revealing their identity.
superhero.gender_id: Numeric representation of the superhero's gender identity.
superhero.eye_colour_id: Numeric code indicating the superhero's eye color.
superhero.hair_colour_id: Numeric code representing the superhero's hair color.
superhero.skin_colour_id: Numeric code denoting the superhero's skin color.
superhero.race_id: Numeric identifier for the superhero's racial background.
superhero.publisher_id: Identifier for the comic book publisher associated with the superhero.
superhero.alignment_id: Numeric value indicating the superhero's moral alignment.
superhero.height_cm: Represents the superhero's height in centimeters, indicating their physical stature.
superhero.weight_kg: Indicates the superhero's weight in kilograms, reflecting their mass and build.

hero_attribute.hero_id: Unique identifier for each hero in the database.
hero_attribute.attribute_id: Identifier for the type of attribute assigned to the hero.
hero_attribute.attribute_value: Numeric value representing the strength or level of the attribute.

superpower.id: Unique identifier for each superpower entry in the database.
superpower.power_name: Descriptive name of the superpower, indicating its unique abilities and characteristics.

hero_power.hero_id: Unique identifier for each hero in the database.
hero_power.power_id: Unique identifier for each power associated with heroes.
